name: Sam Simmons
bio: Sam Simmons is an Australian comedian, actor and radio and television presenter from Adelaide known for surreal, absurdist and prop-heavy stand-up. He became a regular host on the youth radio network Triple J in the mid-2000s and went on to international festival success. In 2015 his show Spaghetti for Breakfast won the Edinburgh Comedy Award for Best Show.

timeline.ev: Becomes a regular host on Triple J radio
First Edinburgh Comedy Award Best Show nomination
Moves to Los Angeles and appears on Conan
Wins Helpmann Award for Best Comedy Performer
Wins Edinburgh Comedy Award for Spaghetti for Breakfast
Also wins the Barry Award for the same show
